---
title: "Ink Layout Test"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
revealjs-plugins:
  - ink
---

## Layout results

::: {#results}
Running...
:::

```{=html}
<script>
window.addEventListener("load", function () {
  setTimeout(function () {
    var out = [];
    var api = window.InkAnnotate._api;
    api.setDrawMode(true);

    function measure(label) {
      var root = document.getElementById("ink-orb-root");
      var rx = parseFloat(root.style.left);
      var ry = parseFloat(root.style.top);
      var petals = Array.prototype.slice.call(
        document.querySelectorAll(".ink-petal")
      ).filter(function (el) { return el.offsetParent !== null; });
      var pts = petals.map(function (el) {
        return {
          x: rx + parseFloat(el.style.getPropertyValue("--tx")),
          y: ry + parseFloat(el.style.getPropertyValue("--ty")),
          r: el.offsetWidth / 2,
          t: el.title
        };
      });
      var worstPair = 0, overlapInfo = "";
      for (var i = 0; i < pts.length; i++) {
        for (var j = i + 1; j < pts.length; j++) {
          var d = Math.hypot(pts[i].x - pts[j].x, pts[i].y - pts[j].y);
          var need = pts[i].r + pts[j].r;
          if (need - d > worstPair) {
            worstPair = need - d;
            overlapInfo = pts[i].t + " / " + pts[j].t;
          }
        }
      }
      var offscreen = pts.filter(function (p) {
        return p.x - p.r < 0 || p.x + p.r > window.innerWidth ||
               p.y - p.r < 0 || p.y + p.r > window.innerHeight;
      }).length;
      var onOrb = pts.filter(function (p) {
        return Math.hypot(p.x - rx, p.y - ry) < p.r + 29;
      }).length;
      out.push((worstPair <= 0.5 ? "PASS" : "FAIL") +
        " - no petal overlap (" + label + ")" +
        (worstPair > 0.5 ? " worst " + worstPair.toFixed(1) + "px: " +
          overlapInfo : ""));
      out.push((offscreen === 0 ? "PASS" : "FAIL") +
        " - all petals on screen (" + label + ")");
      out.push((onOrb === 0 ? "PASS" : "FAIL") +
        " - no petal covers orb (" + label + ")");
    }

    var spots = [
      ["corner", window.innerWidth - 64, window.innerHeight - 64],
      ["edge", window.innerWidth - 40, window.innerHeight / 2],
      ["center", window.innerWidth / 2, window.innerHeight / 2],
      ["top-left", 40, 40]
    ];

    api.setTool("pen");
    api.openBloom();
    spots.forEach(function (s) {
      api.moveOrb(s[1], s[2]);
      measure("pen@" + s[0]);
    });

    api.setTool("shape");
    spots.forEach(function (s) {
      api.moveOrb(s[1], s[2]);
      measure("shape@" + s[0]);
    });

    document.getElementById("results").innerHTML =
      "<pre style='font-size:0.42em'>" + out.join("\n") + "</pre>";
  }, 1500);
});
</script>
```
